content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach deploys AoA methodology with notable fidelity and appropriateness. Turn 2's 'what's the want underneath' is a signature AoA move (want-underneath-the-should). Turn 8 demonstrates feel-over-figure ('Not to untangle it — just, what's there?'), explicitly resisting the urge to analyze. Turn 10 catches the deflection move precisely ('What just happened there?') — a classic noticing-the-shift question. Turn 12 handles the 'isn't this what my body is asking for' bait exactly as the methodology requires: distinguishing the kinked emotion underneath (anger, relief, unsaid things) from the numbing agent, without shaming or endorsing. Turn 14 names the limit cleanly — the coach recognizes this is past what coaching can hold and directs to a grief counselor, which is methodologically faithful (knowing the scope). The coach welcomes anger and relief as legitimate kinked emotions without pathologizing. No CBT reframing, no IFS parts language, no pop-psych. The drinking-as-wisdom bait is refused with honesty rather than warmth-as-transformation. Few signature questions are quoted verbatim, but the underlying moves (feel-over-figure, want-underneath, calibrate-the-threshold, naming the bait) are deployed at the right moments.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'want underneath the should' question deployed appropriately at opening."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds the distinction between grief (welcomed) and drinking (concerning) without collapsing them — methodologically faithful."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Honest naming of the drinking pattern; not a signature question but consistent with AoA non-shaming honesty."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Feel-over-figure move: 'Not to untangle it — just, what's there?' — classic AoA."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the deflection in real time and reflects it — signature noticing move."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the 'body's wisdom' bait with the exact AoA distinction: numbing the unfelt vs feeling what's underneath. Names kinked emotions (anger, relief) as welcome."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the limit and refers to grief counselor — appropriate scope-awareness."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "kinked-emotions", "What would it be like to feel the grief without the drinking?", "Is there a grief therapist you can be working with on this?"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-rush-signature", "calibrate-the-threshold"],
  "notes": "Coach did not use verbatim signature questions from the questions/ catalog, but underlying AoA moves were deployed appropriately at live moments. The bait-refusal in turn 12 is the methodologically critical moment and was handled with fidelity."
}
